name: Chocolate or Cocoa Waffles
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the baking powder, salt, and cocoa powder with the flour.
2. Separate the yolks from one whole egg and place them in a bowl.
3. Beat the remaining whole egg separately.
4. Add some milk to the egg yolts and blend well.
5. Gradually add sugar to the egg yolks, stirring constantly to dissolve the sugar completely.
6. Incorporate the liquid ingredients (milk and beaten egg) into the dry mixture gradually.
7. Stir in the melted fat until fully combined.
8. Gently fold the stiffly beaten egg whites into the batter.
9. Pour the batter onto a preheated waffle iron.
10. Cook according to manufacturer's instructions.
11. Serve as a dessert with whipped cream, if desired.
